title: Ability to Create Private Views for Individual Users

posts.author: irene.yu (Irene)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, monday.com does not support setting views to private but can only manage privacy at the board level.

What are you trying to achieve

It would be helpful to have the ability to create private views within a board that are only visible to the person who created them, rather than being accessible to all board members.

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be awesome! It would be extremely valuable if board owners could create private views that are accessible only to specified members or external clients. Additionally, allowing individual board members to create personal views that are visible only to themselves would enable them to self-manage their workflows and organize tasks in a way that best fits their working style without adding clutter to the shared board.

posts.author: WorkOSMods (O.Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: It’d also be great if we could share specific views with selected teammates.
